what_it_does: This file is a ledger attachment record that associates a channel memory entry in dragnet-development with board item item-182e146b via the board_items attachment type.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It declares an attachment id att-8c487518.
The target is a board:// URI pointing to item-182e146b.
An ISO 8601 added timestamp is present.
standouts: Target uses a board:// URI scheme (board://item-182e146b).
Attachment type is board_items, indicating a channel-to-board linkage.
conventions: Follows the ledger attachment metadata schema with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset.
Represents external references with a URI-style identifier.
concerns: No body or contextual content is included.
The meaning of the linked board item is not described in this file.
notes: A minimal, timestamped channel-to-board attachment record with no explanatory body.
questions: What is the content or subject of board item item-182e146b?
Which specific channel message or thread does this attachment relate to?
Who added this attachment and why?
intention_signals: It appears to persist a typed, timestamped association between a channel artifact and a board item so the relationship can be retrieved later.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme to target a board item is a distinct convention in this ledger.
contribution: It contributes a cross-reference node that records when and how a channel memory entry was attached to a board item, supporting traceability without embedding the board content here.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-only channel attachment record linking a dragnet-development channel entry to board item item-182e146b as a board_items attachment.
intention_for_embedding: To preserve a timestamped, typed link between a channel artifact and a board item for later lookup and association.
